info.title: Hostaway Property Management API
info.description: Hostaway public API for vacation rental property management. Manage listings, reservations, calendars, conversations, finance, webhooks, and tasks.

post.description: Generate a new access token using OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials Grant. Token TTL is 24 months.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of property listings with optional filtering and sorting.

parameters.name: match
parameters.description: Search string to match against listings

parameters.name: isBookingEngineActive
parameters.description: Filter by booking engine active status

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific property listing.

post.description: Upload images for a specific listing.

get.summary: Get cancellation policies for a channel
get.description: Retrieve available cancellation policies for a specific channel (airbnb, booking, marriott, vrbo).
Retrieve calendar data for a specific listing, including availability and pricing.
Retrieve a list of reservations with cursor-based or offset pagination.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip (offset pagination)

parameters.name: afterId
parameters.description: Cursor-based pagination: return results after this reservation ID

post.description: Create a new reservation with price details.

get.description: Get details for a specific reservation.

put.description: Update an existing reservation including price components.

get.description: Retrieve coupons applied to a reservation.

post.description: Apply a coupon to a reservation.

get.description: Retrieve a list of guest conversations.
Get details for a specific conversation.

post.description: Send a message in a guest conversation.
Create an offline charge for a guest.

get.description: Retrieve auto-payment rules for automated charge collection.

post.description: Create a unified webhook for real-time event notifications.

get.description: Retrieve a list of property management tasks.

post.description: Create a new property management task.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 bearer token obtained via Client Credentials Grant

guestsIncluded.description: Number of guests included in base price
